## 🧪 Verification Checklist

- [ ] All code changes pass offline unit tests (`python tests/run_tests.py`).
- [ ] Added unit tests in `tests/` covering new functions/modules.
- [ ] Updated `README.md` or CLI documentation if parameters were added.
- [ ] Verified UTF-8 stdio compatibility across Windows, Linux, and macOS.
